explorations_completed.summary: Recovered Tao's mechanism as a five-mode delayed-threshold circuit embedded into a shell cascade; key intervention questions are now about coupling rigidity, unwanted extra couplings, pressure/Leray interference, and the role of energetically tiny trigger variables.
Narrowed the live firewall candidate to exact-NS circuit non-isolability: exact NS may not realize Tao's five-coupling gate hierarchy without forced spectator couplings and Leray-projection rigidity.
